calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Shaun Markley of the law offices of Nicholas & Tomasevic LLP (619-325-0492) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC's Amended Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment as to defendant Metropolitan Vacuum Cleaner Company is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Continued To Oct-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is CONTINUED to September 12, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302, per agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
